_comment: Single source of truth for the RBLclass product release. The COM identity below MUST match the [Guid]/[ProgId] attributes on the add-in class in src\RBLclass.AddIn. The sentinel Clsid (all-zeros) makes every release script refuse to run until you reconcile these values against the real RBLclass.AddIn source the first time Phase 1 is built.
Description: Classify Outlook mail into PST folders with fast keyword search.
